data.content: Fixed stuck knot c051 (planning -> ready_for_implementation_review) by: 1) Fixing knots-backend.ts update() to detect when target state matches raw kno state (skip no-op) and force non-adjacent transitions. 2) Fixing beat-detail.tsx validNextStates() to compute transitions from actual kno state when rollback mismatch detected, adding all workflow states as escape hatches. 3) Force-set c051 state to ready_for_implementation_review via kno state --force. Commit 1724bd1.
